homepage.heroSubline: Crafting outdoor living spaces designed for the desert climate. Expert pergolas and decks built to last.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Integrity, Crafted for El Paso
aboutText: Red Oaks Pergolas started with a simple goal: to build decks and pergolas that can withstand the harsh El Paso sun and provide families with beautiful, functional outdoor spaces. We're not just builders; we're your neighbors, committed to enhancing our community one project at a time.

Our approach is straightforward: we listen to your needs, design a solution that fits your lifestyle and budget, and execute the project with precision and care. We use only the highest quality materials and employ proven techniques to ensure your deck or pergola stands the test of time.

We're proud to be a part of the El Paso community. We source materials locally whenever possible and actively support local charities and initiatives. When you choose Red Oaks Pergolas, you're not just getting a great deck; you're investing in your community.

valueProps.title: Desert-Ready Designs
valueProps.description: We specialize in decks and pergolas built to withstand El Paso's extreme temperatures and minimal rainfall, using durable materials and proven construction methods.

valueProps.title: Customized Solutions
valueProps.description: From initial consultation to final installation, we work closely with you to create a unique outdoor space that perfectly complements your home and lifestyle.

valueProps.title: Expert Craftsmanship
valueProps.description: Our team of skilled carpenters brings years of experience to every project, ensuring meticulous attention to detail and unparalleled quality.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: We provide clear, detailed estimates upfront, so you know exactly what to expect. No hidden fees, no surprises, just honest and reliable service.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free quote on your dream deck or pergola today! Call us to schedule a consultation.

services.name: Deck Construction
services.shortDescription: Expert deck building for El Paso homes, designed for lasting beauty and enjoyment.
services.description:
We specialize in designing and building custom decks that perfectly complement your El Paso home and lifestyle. From classic wood decks to low-maintenance composite decks, we offer a wide range of materials and styles to choose from. We understand the unique challenges of the El Paso climate, and we build our decks to withstand the intense sun, extreme temperatures, and occasional heavy rains. 

Our deck construction process begins with a thorough consultation to understand your needs and preferences. We'll work with you to create a design that maximizes your outdoor space and enhances your home's value. We handle all aspects of the construction process, from obtaining permits to final inspection, ensuring a smooth and stress-free experience for you. We pride ourselves on our attention to detail and commitment to quality craftsmanship.

Whether you're looking for a small deck for intimate gatherings or a large deck for entertaining, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life. We use only the highest quality materials and employ proven construction techniques to ensure your deck is built to last. We also offer a variety of deck accessories, such as railings, stairs, and lighting, to customize your deck to your exact specifications. Let us help you create the perfect outdoor oasis for your El Paso home.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Design – We discuss your vision and create a custom deck design.
Step 2: Permitting and Preparation – We handle all necessary permits and prepare the construction site.
Step 3: Construction and Installation – Our skilled team builds your deck with precision and care.
Step 4: Final Inspection and Cleanup – We ensure your complete satisfaction and leave your property spotless.
benefits: Customized Design to Fit Your Needs
Durable Construction for the El Paso Climate

faq.question: What materials do you use for deck construction?
faq.answer: We offer a variety of materials, including pressure-treated wood, cedar, redwood, and composite decking. We can help you choose the best material based on your budget, aesthetic preferences, and maintenance requirements.

faq.question: How long does it take to build a deck?
faq.answer: The timeline for deck construction depends on the size and complexity of the project. A typical deck can be completed in 1-2 weeks, but larger or more intricate decks may take longer.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to build a deck in El Paso?
faq.answer: Yes, a permit is typically required to build a deck in El Paso. We handle the permitting process for you, ensuring that your deck meets all local building codes and regulations.

services.name: Pergola Construction
services.shortDescription: Custom pergolas designed to provide shade and beauty in the El Paso sun.
services.description:
Enhance your El Paso outdoor living space with a custom-built pergola from Red Oaks Pergolas. We specialize in designing and constructing pergolas that provide shade, style, and a focal point for your backyard. Our pergolas are built to withstand the harsh El Paso sun and add value to your home. We offer a variety of pergola styles, from traditional to modern, and can customize your pergola to your exact specifications. 

Our pergola construction process begins with a consultation to understand your needs and preferences. We'll work with you to create a design that complements your home's architecture and provides the perfect amount of shade. We use only the highest quality materials, such as cedar, redwood, and pressure-treated wood, to ensure your pergola is built to last. We also offer a variety of finishing options, such as staining and painting, to match your home's exterior.

Whether you're looking for a small pergola to create a cozy seating area or a large pergola to cover your entire patio, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life. We handle all aspects of the construction process, from obtaining permits to final inspection, ensuring a smooth and stress-free experience for you. Let us help you create the perfect outdoor retreat for your El Paso home.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation – We discuss your pergola needs and design preferences.
Step 2: Material Selection – We help you choose the best materials for your pergola based on your budget and style.
Step 3: Construction and Installation – Our experienced team builds your pergola with precision and attention to detail.
Step 4: Finishing Touches – We stain or paint your pergola to match your home's exterior.
benefits: Provides Shade and Protection from the Sun
Adds Beauty and Style to Your Backyard
Creates a Comfortable Outdoor Living Space

faq.question: What types of wood do you use for pergolas?
faq.answer: We primarily use cedar, redwood, and pressure-treated wood for our pergolas. Each material offers unique benefits in terms of durability, aesthetics, and cost.

faq.question: Can you build a pergola attached to my house?
faq.answer: Yes, we can build attached pergolas that seamlessly integrate with your home's existing structure. We'll ensure that the pergola is properly supported and connected to your home for maximum stability.

faq.question: Do I need to maintain my pergola?
faq.answer: Yes, regular maintenance is recommended to keep your pergola looking its best. This may include cleaning, staining, and sealing to protect the wood from the elements.

services.name: Deck Repair & Restoration
services.shortDescription: Extending the life of your El Paso deck with expert repairs and restoration services.
services.description:
Don't let a damaged deck detract from your El Paso home's beauty and value. Red Oaks Pergolas offers comprehensive deck repair and restoration services to keep your deck safe, functional, and looking its best. We understand the unique challenges that the El Paso climate poses to decks, and we have the expertise to address a wide range of issues, from rotting wood to loose railings.

Our deck repair services include replacing damaged boards, repairing or replacing railings, reinforcing support beams, and addressing water damage. We use only the highest quality materials and employ proven techniques to ensure your deck is structurally sound and aesthetically pleasing. Our restoration services include power washing, staining, and sealing to protect your deck from the elements and enhance its natural beauty.

Whether your deck needs minor repairs or a complete overhaul, we have the expertise to get the job done right. We'll assess the condition of your deck and provide you with a detailed estimate outlining the necessary repairs and restoration work. We pride ourselves on our transparent pricing and commitment to customer satisfaction. Let us help you extend the life of your El Paso deck and enjoy your outdoor space for years to come.
process: Step 1: Deck Inspection – We thoroughly inspect your deck to identify any damage or problem areas.
Step 2: Repair Plan – We develop a detailed repair plan and provide you with a transparent estimate.
Step 3: Deck Repairs – Our skilled team performs the necessary repairs using high-quality materials.
Step 4: Deck Restoration – We clean, stain, and seal your deck to protect it from the elements.
benefits: Extends the Life of Your Deck

faq.question: How do I know if my deck needs repair?
faq.answer: Signs that your deck may need repair include rotting wood, loose railings, wobbly stairs, and sagging support beams. If you notice any of these issues, it's important to have your deck inspected by a professional.

faq.question: What is the best way to protect my deck from the El Paso sun?
faq.answer: Staining and sealing your deck regularly is the best way to protect it from the El Paso sun. We recommend using a high-quality sealant with UV inhibitors to prevent fading and cracking.

faq.question: How often should I clean my deck?
faq.answer: We recommend cleaning your deck at least once a year to remove dirt, debris, and mildew. Power washing can be an effective way to clean your deck, but it's important to use the correct pressure to avoid damaging the wood.

services.name: Pergola Repair & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keeping your El Paso pergola in top shape with expert repairs and maintenance.
services.description:
Protect your investment and keep your pergola looking its best with Red Oaks Pergolas' expert repair and maintenance services. We understand the importance of maintaining your pergola to ensure its longevity and structural integrity, especially in the challenging El Paso climate. Our team of experienced carpenters can address a wide range of pergola issues, from minor repairs to major structural damage.

Our pergola repair services include replacing damaged posts, beams, and slats, repairing or replacing hardware, and reinforcing connections. We use only the highest quality materials and employ proven techniques to ensure your pergola is structurally sound and aesthetically pleasing. Our maintenance services include cleaning, staining, and sealing to protect your pergola from the elements and prevent rot, decay, and insect infestation.

Whether your pergola needs a minor tune-up or a complete overhaul, we have the expertise to get the job done right. We'll assess the condition of your pergola and provide you with a detailed estimate outlining the necessary repairs and maintenance work. We pride ourselves on our transparent pricing and commitment to customer satisfaction. Let us help you keep your El Paso pergola in top shape for years to come.
process: Step 1: Pergola Inspection – We inspect your pergola for damage, rot, and insect infestation.
Step 2: Repair Plan – We create a detailed repair plan and provide you with a transparent estimate.
Step 3: Pergola Repairs – Our skilled team performs the necessary repairs using high-quality materials.
Step 4: Pergola Maintenance – We clean, stain, and seal your pergola to protect it from the elements.
benefits: Extends the Life of Your Pergola

faq.question: How often should I maintain my pergola?
faq.answer: We recommend maintaining your pergola at least once a year to protect it from the elements and prevent damage. This may include cleaning, staining, and sealing.

faq.question: What are the signs of pergola damage?
faq.answer: Signs of pergola damage include rotting wood, cracked or broken posts, loose connections, and insect infestation. If you notice any of these issues, it's important to have your pergola inspected by a professional.

faq.question: Can you repair a pergola that has been damaged by termites?
faq.answer: Yes, we can repair pergolas that have been damaged by termites. We'll remove the damaged wood and replace it with treated lumber to prevent future infestations.

services.name: Deck Staining & Sealing
services.shortDescription: Protecting and beautifying your El Paso deck with professional staining and sealing.
services.description:
Protect your El Paso deck from the harsh elements with Red Oaks Pergolas' professional staining and sealing services. Our expert team uses high-quality stains and sealants to enhance your deck's natural beauty and protect it from sun damage, water damage, and mildew. We understand the unique challenges of the El Paso climate, and we use products that are specifically designed to withstand the intense sun and extreme temperatures.

Our deck staining and sealing process begins with a thorough cleaning to remove dirt, debris, and mildew. We then apply a high-quality stain or sealant that will protect your deck from the elements and enhance its natural beauty. We offer a wide range of stain colors to choose from, so you can find the perfect match for your home's exterior. We also offer clear sealants that will protect your deck without changing its color.

Whether you're looking to protect a new deck or restore an existing one, we have the expertise to get the job done right. We pride ourselves on our attention to detail and commitment to customer satisfaction. Let us help you keep your El Paso deck looking its best for years to come.
process: Step 1: Deck Cleaning – We thoroughly clean your deck to remove dirt, debris, and mildew.
Step 2: Stain/Sealant Application – We apply a high-quality stain or sealant to protect your deck from the elements.
Step 3: Drying Time – We allow the stain or sealant to dry completely.
Step 4: Final Inspection – We inspect your deck to ensure that the stain or sealant has been applied evenly and thoroughly.

faq.question: How often should I stain or seal my deck?
faq.answer: We recommend staining or sealing your deck every 1-2 years, depending on the type of product used and the amount of exposure to the elements.

faq.question: What is the difference between stain and sealant?
faq.answer: Stain adds color to your deck and provides some protection from the elements, while sealant is a clear coating that protects your deck from water damage and mildew. Some products combine both stain and sealant in one.

faq.question: Can I stain or seal my deck myself?
faq.answer: While it is possible to stain or seal your deck yourself, we recommend hiring a professional to ensure that the job is done correctly and that the products are applied evenly and thoroughly.

services.name: Custom Deck Design
services.shortDescription: Creating the perfect outdoor living space with custom deck designs tailored for El Paso.
services.description:
Transform your backyard into an outdoor oasis with a custom deck design from Red Oaks Pergolas. We specialize in creating unique and functional deck designs that perfectly complement your El Paso home and lifestyle. Our experienced designers will work closely with you to understand your needs and preferences, and we'll create a design that maximizes your outdoor space and enhances your home's value.

Our deck design process begins with a thorough consultation to discuss your vision, budget, and lifestyle. We'll then create a 3D rendering of your deck design, so you can visualize the finished product before construction begins. We'll also provide you with a detailed estimate outlining the cost of materials and labor.

Whether you're looking for a simple deck for relaxing or a multi-level deck for entertaining, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life. We use only the highest quality materials and employ proven construction techniques to ensure your deck is built to last. Let us help you create the perfect outdoor living space for your El Paso home.
process: Step 1: Initial Consultation – We discuss your vision, budget, and lifestyle.
Step 2: Design Development – We create a 3D rendering of your deck design.
Step 3: Material Selection – We help you choose the best materials for your deck.
Step 4: Estimate Approval – We provide you with a detailed estimate for the project.
benefits: Customized Design to Fit Your Needs

faq.question: How much does a custom deck design cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a custom deck design depends on the size and complexity of the project. We offer free consultations and estimates, so contact us today to discuss your project.

faq.question: How long does it take to design a deck?
faq.answer: The timeline for designing a deck depends on the complexity of the project. A typical deck design can be completed in 1-2 weeks.

faq.question: Can you incorporate features like built-in seating and outdoor kitchens into my deck design?
faq.answer: Yes, we can incorporate a variety of features into your deck design, including built-in seating, outdoor kitchens, fire pits, and more.

We understand the unique architectural styles and desert climate of the area, and we tailor our designs to perfectly complement your home and withstand the elements. From custom pergolas that provide shade and beauty to durable decks perfect for outdoor entertaining, we're committed to bringing your outdoor vision to life.

Our team uses only the highest-quality materials and construction techniques to ensure lasting beauty and functionality. reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: Red Oaks Pergolas built us a fantastic deck! The whole team was professional, efficient, and the quality of their work is outstanding. Our family is already enjoying our new outdoor space. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We hired Red Oaks to build a pergola to provide shade on our patio. The design process was collaborative, and they were very accommodating to our requests. The finished pergola looks great and is exactly what we wanted. There was a small delay due to material availability, but they kept us informed throughout the process.

reviews.name: Jessica S.
reviews.text: Our deck was in rough shape after years of El Paso sun and monsoons. Red Oaks Pergolas did an excellent job repairing and restoring it. They replaced damaged boards, reinforced the structure, and applied a fresh coat of stain. It looks like new!

reviews.name: Robert L.
reviews.text: Red Oaks Pergolas did a fantastic job staining and sealing our deck. They were professional, efficient, and paid close attention to detail. The deck looks great, and we know it's well-protected from the elements.

reviews.name: Amy P.
reviews.text: We had some damage to our pergola after a recent windstorm. Red Oaks Pergolas came out quickly and made the necessary repairs. They were professional, reliable, and their prices were fair.

reviews.name: Carlos M.
reviews.text: I couldn't be happier with the deck Red Oaks Pergolas built for us. They were professional, communicative, and the quality of their work is exceptional. The deck is perfect for entertaining and relaxing. I highly recommend them!
